name: King-Capper-V1.docx
content:
What capping machines does C.E. King offer?

C.E. King manufactures and supplies a range of capping machines including ROPP (Roll-On Pilfer-Proof), screw cappers, and press-on cappers. The range covers semi-automatic bench-top units to fully automatic in-line systems.

Details

  • ROPP capping heads with hysteresis magnetic clutch available
  • Screw capping for standard and child-resistant closures
  • Press capping for snap-on and push-fit caps
  • Machines can be adjusted for different bottle and cap sizes
  • Spare parts including gripper assemblies, capping heads, and clutch components available
  • Legacy King Capper models (e.g., M19285, C60) still supported for spare parts
  • Suitable for pharmaceutical, food, beverage, and cosmetic industries

Link: https://www.ceking.com/collections/capping-machines
